title: Pali Grammar Summary Card
subtitle: Pronouns, Adverbs, and Particles
pageTitle: Pali Grammar Summary Card: Pronouns, Adverbs, and Particles
author: Dhammadarsa Bhikkhu
summary: A concise tabular summary of the rules of Pali personal pronoun declension, plus lists of adverbs and particles, formatted for convenient printing in the form of cards for study or reference. Includes examples and vocabulary lists adapted from A.P. Buddhadatta's "New Pali Course".
